stories.title: Use pure analysis skills via MCP
stories.description: As an MCP client developer, I want to call pure analysis skills with my own data, so that I can get consistent analysis results regardless of data source

acceptanceCriteria.description: All 14 skills follow Anthropic Agent Skills specification
Skills accept client data as input parameters
Skills return consistent results for same input
Skills have proper YAML frontmatter with metadata

stories.title: Provide stock data for analysis
stories.description: As an MCP client, I want to provide my own OHLCV and fundamental data when requesting analysis, so that I can use my preferred data sources

acceptanceCriteria.description: Client can provide OHLCV data in standard format
Client can provide fundamental metrics
Data validation provides clear error messages
Optional fields are handled gracefully

stories.title: Store analysis results automatically
stories.description: As a system administrator, I want all analysis results stored automatically in the database, so that we can track analysis history

acceptanceCriteria.description: Analysis request data is stored with timestamp
Analysis results are stored with full details
Client ID is recorded for each analysis
Database handles concurrent writes correctly

stories.title: View analysis history in dashboard
stories.description: As a portfolio manager, I want to view all historical analyses in a web dashboard, so that I can track analysis patterns over time

acceptanceCriteria.description: Dashboard displays list of all analyses
Analysis details are viewable on click
Charts show analysis trends over time
Dashboard loads quickly with pagination

stories.title: Search for specific analyses
stories.description: As an analyst, I want to search for analyses by ticker, date, or type, so that I can quickly find relevant historical analyses

acceptanceCriteria.description: Search by ticker symbol returns matching analyses
Date range filtering works correctly
Filter by analysis type (technical, fundamental, etc.)
Combined filters work together

stories.title: View trend analytics
stories.description: As a data scientist, I want to see trend analytics from accumulated analyses, so that I can identify patterns and insights

acceptanceCriteria.description: Dashboard shows most analyzed stocks
Trend charts display analysis frequency over time
Success rate metrics are calculated and displayed
Aggregate insights are generated from data

stories.title: Access data via REST API
stories.description: As a developer, I want to query analysis data via REST API, so that I can integrate with other systems

acceptanceCriteria.description: GET endpoint returns paginated analysis list
Query parameters support filtering
API returns proper JSON responses
API documentation is comprehensive

stories.title: View client-specific analyses
stories.description: As a multi-client user, I want to see analyses specific to my client ID, so that data remains isolated

acceptanceCriteria.description: Client ID is captured for each analysis
Dashboard filters by client ID
API respects client ID filtering
Client data isolation is enforced

stories.title: Export analysis data
stories.description: As a compliance officer, I want to export analysis data in various formats, so that I can create reports and documentation

acceptanceCriteria.description: Export to CSV format with all fields
Export to JSON with proper structure
PDF export includes charts and summaries
Export respects current filters

stories.title: Experience fast dashboard performance
stories.description: As a dashboard user, I want the interface to respond quickly even with millions of records, so that I can work efficiently

acceptanceCriteria.description: Dashboard loads in under 2 seconds
Search queries return in under 1 second
Charts render smoothly without lag
Pagination handles large datasets efficiently

stories.title: See real-time analysis updates
stories.description: As a trading desk user, I want to see new analyses appear in real-time, so that I can monitor current activity

acceptanceCriteria.description: WebSocket connection established on dashboard load
New analyses appear without page refresh
Connection automatically reconnects if dropped
Real-time updates can be toggled on/off

stories.title: Compare multiple analyses
stories.description: As an investment analyst, I want to compare multiple analyses side-by-side, so that I can identify differences and trends

acceptanceCriteria.description: Select multiple analyses for comparison
Side-by-side view shows all metrics
Differences are highlighted visually
Comparison can be exported

stories.title: Audit analysis activities
stories.description: As a compliance officer, I want comprehensive audit logs of all analysis activities, so that I can track usage and ensure compliance

acceptanceCriteria.description: All analysis requests are logged with timestamp
Data access is logged with user/client ID
Audit logs are searchable
Logs are retained per compliance policy

stories.title: Manage data retention
stories.description: As a system administrator, I want to configure data retention policies, so that storage costs are managed while maintaining compliance

acceptanceCriteria.description: Configure retention period in days/months
Automatic archival of old data
Deletion of expired data is automated
Retention policies are logged

stories.title: Customize dashboard layout
stories.description: As a power user, I want to customize my dashboard layout and save preferred views, so that I can optimize my workflow

acceptanceCriteria.description: Drag and drop widgets to rearrange layout
Save custom dashboard configurations
Switch between saved views
Share dashboard views with team
